records.title: parser option handling investigation
records.text_summary: The parser option handling path in Click flows through add_to_parser in src/click/core.py. Validation belongs in tests/test_parser.py and tests/test_options.py. Ignore old shell completion and CI cleanup notes.

records.text_summary: Focused regression coverage is tests/test_parser.py and tests/test_options.py. The implementation path is still add_to_parser in src/click/core.py.
